title: FigmaDesignSystemContract
description: Figma extraction. Composes ref-envelope (meta + variables + styles). LLM-produced in Task 1 via figma-dev-mode-mcp get_variable_defs. BLOCK tier — must validate before Task 3.

variables.description: Display name → variable entry. Key is the Figma variable's display name (drifts on rename). Use figmaId (in entry) for stable identity.
